violations.text: The floor in the walk-in cooler is made from unfinished cement, which is not easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Establishment is looking into options or receive quotes for finishing of walk-in cooler floor surface. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

The floor and wall junctures of the walk-in cooler are lacking coving. Coving and sealing of the floor/wall junctures are required to provide a surface that is conducive to water flushing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
